allow: PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Stop-Process -Id \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3002 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Puertos liberados")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); p=[r for r in d if r['status']=='PENDING']; print\('PENDIENTES:',len\(p\), [r['product']['name'] for r in p]\)")
